user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Chanel
Product type: No. 5 perfume fragrance
Tone: elegant, timeless, luxurious
Visual style: A minimalist yet opulent visual style featuring classic black and white contrasts with gold accents, emphasizing sophistication and heritage.
Conceptual technique: iconic celebrity endorsement with aspirational storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Inevitable.
brief.caption: In a cinematic black-and-white scene, a Hollywood starlet dashes through a bustling city street, effortlessly captivating the crowd as she clutches a bottle of Chanel No. 5. Her aura of mystery and allure is undeniable, making the fragrance an essential part of her legend.
brief.visual_style: A minimalist yet opulent visual style featuring classic black and white contrasts with gold accents, emphasizing sophistication and heritage.
brief.conceptual_technique: iconic celebrity endorsement with aspirational storytelling
brief.typography_style: Classic serif with high contrast, reminiscent of vintage luxury branding
brief.color_scheme: monochrome black and white with touches of gold
